prompt: Review the Primitive docs landing page (snapshot of pre-audit docs/index.md) for quality and adherence to the repo's documentation standards.

assertions.text: Flags the web/browser-only framing (architecture diagram says 'Your App (Browser)', 'local in-browser database', JS-only stack) as a platform-neutrality violation given iOS is a first-class platform
Flags mechanism-level detail as wrong altitude for an overview page (the defineModelSchema/JsBaoClient code samples and package-by-package stack detail)
Flags the 'runs on edge infrastructure' line (or equivalent) as an infrastructure-internals leak
Findings cite which standard/rule is violated and propose concrete fixes (not just observations)
Review classifies the page as a landing/overview-tier page and judges it against that tier
